title: Arm 推出全新人工智能 (AI) CPU，Nabs Meta、OpenAI、Cloudflare 成为首批客户
content: 这标志着这家芯片设计公司的重大转变，此前该公司仅对其知识产权进行许可。
original_title: Arm Debuts New Artificial Intelligence (AI) CPU, Nabs Meta, OpenAI, Cloudflare as First Customers
original_content: This marks a significant departure for the chip designer, which has previously only licensed its intellectual property.
